projects.brief: These are the general features of the projects
features: All projects have been uploaded to Github, so you can track projects flow.
Projects have been created using Agile development method.
Some projects is made by a team, and each member of teams worked on all parts of the projects.

languages.brief: Programming languages are the language which we can make the computer understand commands. These's a lot of languages in the world, each language have its features and weaknesses, it's depending on what we want to do!
